name: Atelier Modules
label: Atelier Modules
description: atelier-chrome + dock — a starter Atelier marketplace.

requires.note: macOS only — relies on launchd/launchctl + ~/Library/LaunchAgents plists
Homebrew required to install apps' declared system CLIs
gh needed for private/authenticated marketplace repos
